name: GAF_SyteLine_WorkCenterSearch_Tool_v1
description: Search for work centers in SyteLine by code or description keyword

data.api_docs:
Method: GET
Endpoint: /load/SLWcs
CRITICAL: The endpoint above is RELATIVE — the service path 'CSI/IDORequestService/ido' is prepended automatically. Do NOT repeat the service path in the endpoint or add tenant names, config values, 'api', 'invoke', or extra segments.
Headers:
X-Infor-MongooseConfig: <site>
Query Parameters:
Parameter: properties
Format: STRING
Required: True
Description: CRITICAL: ONLY use these exact properties: Wc,Description,Dept. Do NOT request any other properties — they do not exist on this IDO. No ResourceGroup, no Rgid, no other fields.
Parameter: filter
Format: STRING
Required: False
Description: SQL WHERE clause to filter work centers. Examples: Description LIKE '%assembly%' OR Wc LIKE 'FA%' OR Wc = 'CUT-10'
Parameter: orderby
Format: STRING
Required: False
Description: Sort order. Use: Wc ASC
Parameter: recordCap
Format: INTEGER
Required: False
Description: Maximum records to return. Default: 100
Example Request:
Search for assembly-related work centers:
GET /load/SLWcs?properties=Wc,Description,Dept&filter=Description LIKE '%Assembly%'&orderby=Wc ASC
data.responseInstructions:
The API responds with a JSON object containing an Items array with work centers.
Key Response Fields:
- Items: Array of work center objects (empty if none found)
- Wc: Work center code (e.g., FA-400, CUT-10, INS-20)
- Description: Work center description (e.g., Final Assembly Area)
- Dept: Department code
- Success: Boolean indicating API success
RESOURCE GROUP NAMING CONVENTION:
Each work center has resource groups following this pattern:
- Labor resource group: <Wc>-LRG (e.g., FA-400-LRG)
- Machine resource group: <Wc>-MRG (e.g., Cut-10-MRG)
IMPORTANT: Resource group IDs (Rgid) are CASE-SENSITIVE. Use the exact Wc casing from the response.
Example: If Wc='Cut-10', then Rgid='Cut-10-MRG' (NOT 'CUT-10-MRG').
LRG = Labor type (SchedDrv='L'). MRG = Machine type (SchedDrv='M').
CRITICAL - IF ERROR OCCURS INCLUDE THE BELOW IN RESPONSE
  ---DEBUG---
  FULL_URL: [The complete URL that was called]
  FULL_RESPONSE: [The complete API response received]
  ---END DEBUG---

instructions:
Search SyteLine work centers by code or description keyword.
ONLY request properties: Wc,Description,Dept. Do NOT add ResourceGroup or any other properties.
Resource groups: <Wc>-LRG (Labor), <Wc>-MRG (Machine). Rgid is CASE-SENSITIVE.

SITE: <site> placeholder = [TENANT]_DALS from agent input.
